description_long: This is a modern tactical rifle with a matte black upper receiver and handguard, paired with a tan adjustable stock and pistol grip. The rifle features a long, slim barrel with a flash hider at the muzzle, and a detachable box magazine inserted into the magwell. The handguard is equipped with multiple rail segments for mounting accessories, and the upper receiver appears to have a flat top for optics or sights. The stock is collapsible, allowing for length adjustment to suit different users. The overall design is utilitarian and robust, suitable for urban environments and tactical applications.
description: A modern tactical rifle with a black upper and tan collapsible stock, featuring a long barrel, detachable magazine, and accessory rails.
description_view_0: Side view showing the tan collapsible stock, pistol grip, black handguard with rails, and the full length of the barrel.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular barrel opening, flash hider, and the width of the handguard with visible rail segments.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the tan stock, pistol grip, black handguard, and the detachable magazine.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the end of the tan stock, the buffer tube, and the alignment of the barrel and handguard.
